title: Best Day Ever
description: Kid-2 declares it the best day ever while watching soccer, eating chicken fingers and fries, drinking a Shirley Temple, and proudly wearing a lei, grass skirt, and bright pink Crocs as Grandma Kelly smiles beside him.
alt: Grandma Kelly and Kid-2 sit together in a bright, family-friendly sports restaurant with several televisions showing soccer matches. Kid-2 wears a colorful lei, a grass skirt over shorts, and bright pink Crocs while holding a red Shirley Temple with cherries. His plate of chicken fingers and fries sits on the table, and he says, 'This is the best day ever.' Grandma Kelly smiles warmly beside him with a dark cola and a steak-and-cheese sandwich.
